common_params.name: partner_id
common_params.description: Partner ID is assigned upon registration is successful. Required for all requests.

common_params.name: timestamp
common_params.description: This is to indicate the timestamp of the request. Required for all requests. Expires in 5 minutes.

common_params.name: access_token
common_params.description: The token for API access, using to identify your permission to the api. Valid for multiple use and expires in 4 hours.

common_params.name: shop_id
common_params.description: Shopee's unique identifier for a shop. Required param for most APIs.

common_params.name: sign
common_params.description: Signature generated by partner_id, api path, timestamp, access_token, shop_id and partner_key via HMAC-SHA256 hashing algorithm. More details: https://open.shopee.com/documents?module=87&type=2&id=58&version=2

define:
For CB orders that fulfilled by 3PF, support 3PF Warehouse Vendors to update the tpf_tracking_status when 3PF warehouse receive the order and complete the outbound of the package.
CB orders that fulfilled by 3PF：
v2.shop.get_shop_info  - shop_fulfillment_flag in {Pure - 3PF Shop,PFF - 3PF Shop,LFF Hybrid Shop}
And
v2.order.get_order_detail -  fulfillment_flag = fulfilled_by_local_seller

request_params.description: The name of 3PF Warehouse Vendor. Prohibit pure numbers and excessive abbreviations. Standardize naming for easy business recognition. Input priority: warehouse English name > full pinyin of warehouse brand name > warehouse Chinese name > other officially recognized and prominent names.
request_params.name: tpf_name

request_params.description:
The 3PF tracking status for the timestamp. All statuses are in lower case. 

List of status: 

- 3pf_warehouse_order_created

- 3pf_warehouse_outbound_done
request_params.name: tpf_tracking_status

children.description: Shopee's unique identifier for the package under an order.
children.name: package_number

children.description:
This is to indicate timestamp of the 3PF tracking status.

Timestamp should be within order create time and order pick up by 3PL time.
children.name: update_time

request_sample.value:
<?php

$curl = curl_init();

curl_setopt_array($curl, array(
  CURLOPT_URL => 'https://partner.shopeemobile.com/api/v2/logistics/batch_update_tpf_warehouse_tracking_status?access_token=access_token&partner_id=partner_id&shop_id=shop_id&sign=sign&timestamp=timestamp',
  CURLOPT_RETURNTRANSFER => true,
  CURLOPT_ENCODING => '',
  CURLOPT_MAXREDIRS => 10,
  CURLOPT_TIMEOUT => 0,
  CURLOPT_FOLLOWLOCATION => true,
  CURLOPT_HTTP_VERSION => CURL_HTTP_VERSION_1_1,
  CURLOPT_CUSTOMREQUEST => 'POST',
  CURLOPT_POSTFIELDS => '{
    "package_list": [
        {
            "order_sn": "2003160SXK2A3T",
            "package_number": "OFG38027870177402",
            "update_time": 1610000000
        },
        {
            "order_sn": "201214JASXYXY6",
            "package_number": "OFG134731496217591",
            "update_time": 1610000000
        }
    ],
    "tpf_name": "Shopee 3PF",
    "tpf_tracking_status": "3pf_warehouse_outbound_done"
}',
  CURLOPT_HTTPHEADER => array(
    'Content-Type: application/json'
  ),
));

$response = curl_exec($curl);

curl_close($curl);
echo $response;
